Production Supervisor

Netflix

Burbank, CA • On-site

Content outside job card that should NOT be selected

Job description

Netflix Animation Studios is on a mission to entertain the world with bold, immersive animated films.
Job Summary:
We are seeking a Production Supervisor to support one of our Unannounced CG animated feature films.
What You'll do:
  • Create and update workflow documents for your department
  • Working with the Production Manager, create schedules and tools

What You'll Need:
  • 2+ years experience as a Production Supervisor on a CG feature films or related experience preferred
